options.content:
Service {{data.0.hostname}}
Image {{data.0.image}}
Image Source {{data.0.container_label_org_opencontainers_image_source}}
App/Stack {{data.0.container_label_org_app}}
Role {{data.0.container_label_org_role}}
Kind {{data.0.container_label_org_kind}}
Team {{data.0.container_label_org_team}}
Server {{data.0.server}}
Health {{#if (eq data.0.health_check '0')}}Healthy{{else}}Unhealthy{{/if}}
options.defaultContent:
Service {{variable "container_name"}}

Health check unavailable for current service.

panels.description:
Services health and operational information. The links take you to a more detailed service dashboard, and the status codes are as follows:

- **OK:** Request succeeded (even with HTTP errors).
- **RSM:** Body mismatch with `response_string_match`.
- **BRE:** Failed to read body, invalid UTF-8, or oversized response.
- **CNF:** General network connection failure.
- **TO:** Request timed out.
- **DNS:** DNS resolution error.
- **SCM:** Status code mismatch with expected value.

Polling interval by default is 10s. [Learn more in the Telegraf HTTP Response Input Plugin](https://github.com/influxdata/telegraf/tree/master/plugins/inputs/http_response)

targets.expr: sum by (cluster, hostname, server) (echo_health_result_code{cluster=~"$cluster", hostname!="", hostname="$service"})

panels.title: Current Health

options.content:
Log Count {{log_count}}
Log Rate (log/s) {{log_rate}}
Service Logs Dashboard

targets.expr: {org_id="network-services", team="network-development", container_name=~"$service", level=~"$level_filter", cluster=~"$cluster"} |~ `.*$search_message.*` | pattern `<message>` | line_format "[{{.container_name}}] {{.message}}"

panels.description:
Services health and operational information. The links take you to a more detailed service dashboard, and the status codes are as follows:

- **OK:** Request succeeded (even with HTTP errors).
- **RSM:** Body mismatch with `response_string_match`.
- **BRE:** Failed to read body, invalid UTF-8, or oversized response.
- **CNF:** General network connection failure.
- **TO:** Request timed out.
- **DNS:** DNS resolution error.
- **SCM:** Status code mismatch with expected value.

Polling interval by default is 10s. [Learn more in the Telegraf HTTP Response Input Plugin](https://github.com/influxdata/telegraf/tree/master/plugins/inputs/http_response)

targets.expr: sum by (cluster, hostname, server) (echo_health_result_code{cluster="$cluster", hostname!="", external="false"})
sum by(cluster, hostname, server) (echo_health_result_code{cluster="$cluster", hostname!="", external="false"})

label_replace(
    sum by(cluster, hostname, name) (
        (time() - container_start_time_seconds{cluster="$cluster", hostname!="", container_label_com_docker_compose_project="echo"})/3600
    ),
    "hostname",
    "$2",
    "container_label_com_docker_compose_service",
    "(^echo-?(echo-?).*)"
)
